simply_tent.title: Set up a Simply Tents tent camp near your base — set respawn to CAMP mode

hammock.title: Place a Comforts hammock in your base (does NOT set respawn — for comfort and sleep only)

subtitle.text: You have been fighting since Ch01. You are allowed to sleep now.

description: Craft a tent and place it in the world.
CAMP mode sets the respawn to the tent's location.
SHELTER mode gives basic protection without respawn binding.
Tents are portable. Use them as mobile bases during exploration.
Hammocks do not set respawn — they are for comfort only.
Sleeping in a hammock skips time without the respawn risk.
Place a hammock in your base for a home rest.
Place a tent in the field for respawn safety.
Use the right tool for the right situation.
After the End, rest is not laziness. It is recovery.
→ Set up a Simply Tents camp with CAMP respawn [check]
→ Place a Comforts hammock in your base [check]
